expectations.text: Block class overrides getCacheContexts() method AND merges with parent: Cache::mergeContexts(parent::getCacheContexts(), [...]) (NOT just inline #cache contexts -- block-level cache methods are the canonical way, and parent merge preserves block placement contexts)
expectations.evidence: RelatedContentBlock.php line 181-189: getCacheContexts() method overrides parent and returns Cache::mergeContexts(parent::getCacheContexts(), ['url.path', 'user'])

expectations.text: Block class overrides getCacheTags() method AND merges with parent: Cache::mergeTags(parent::getCacheTags(), [...]) (NOT just inline #cache tags -- overriding without parent merge loses tags from block configuration)
expectations.evidence: RelatedContentBlock.php line 194-199: getCacheTags() method overrides parent and returns Cache::mergeTags(parent::getCacheTags(), ['node_list'])

expectations.text: getCacheTags() or #cache tags include 'node_list' tag for list-level invalidation (when ANY node is created/updated/deleted, the list needs re-evaluation -- per-node tags alone miss new content)
expectations.evidence: RelatedContentBlock.php line 198: return Cache::mergeTags(parent::getCacheTags(), ['node_list']); -- 'node_list' tag is present in getCacheTags()

expectations.text: Uses Cache::PERMANENT for max-age or omits max-age entirely (NOT a hardcoded number like 3600 -- content with proper cache tags should use PERMANENT and rely on tag invalidation, not time-based expiry)
expectations.evidence: RelatedContentBlock.php line 205: return Cache::PERMANENT; -- getCacheMaxAge() explicitly returns Cache::PERMANENT

expectations.text: Does NOT set max-age to 0 anywhere (max-age: 0 bubbles up and kills the ENTIRE page cache via Dynamic Page Cache -- use lazy_builder instead for per-user content)
expectations.evidence: Searched all module files for max-age 0 patterns -- no matches found. getCacheMaxAge() returns Cache::PERMANENT (line 205)

expectations.text: Does NOT use \Drupal::cache() or manual cache API for render caching (render arrays use #cache metadata for automatic caching, not manual cache get/set)
expectations.evidence: Grep for '\Drupal::cache()' in the module returned no matches. The module uses #cache render array metadata and block cache method overrides exclusively.

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en related_content_block returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: ddev drush en related_content_block -y returned: '[notice] Already installed: related_content_block' with EXIT_CODE: 0

expectations.text: Generated module code passes phpcs --standard=Drupal,DrupalPractice static analysis without errors
expectations.evidence: ddev exec phpcs --standard=Drupal,DrupalPractice web/modules/custom/related_content_block/ returned EXIT_CODE: 0 with no error output
